scripts.local:quickstart: npm run docker:up && npm run local:prepare && npm run pm2:rebuild
scripts.pm2:start: npm run local:prepare && node scripts/try-docker-mongo.cjs && node scripts/wait-for-local-mongo.cjs && npm run ports:free && node scripts/pm2-start-ordered.cjs
scripts.pm2:stop: npx pm2 delete vems-api vems-web 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.pm2:restart: npm run local:prepare && node scripts/try-docker-mongo.cjs && node scripts/wait-for-local-mongo.cjs && npm run pm2:stop && npm run ports:free && node scripts/pm2-start-ordered.cjs
scripts.pm2:rebuild: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm run pm2:restart
